notes: Independent invalid-data folder, quick UI theme switcher, readability fixes, updated in-app instructions
changelog: Fixed: "Detect invalid data" silently never ran unless the HEX/Text Scanner checkbox was also enabled — now works independently, with its own destination folder separate from the HEX/text pattern folder
NEW: quick 4-color theme switcher next to the interface zoom slider — changes only the live app's own look, completely independent from the report's color settings in the Settings tab
Fixed: input fields, table headers and highlighted panels stayed in the old dark colors when switching to a light interface theme (two CSS variables were missing from the color mapping)
Fixed: quick-theme swatches were indistinguishable for dark-vs-dark and light-vs-light options — now split two-tone (background + accent) instead of a single flat color
Fixed: quick-theme preset names stayed in Polish regardless of app language
Fixed: clicking a report color preset in Settings was incorrectly repainting the whole app interface too
Updated: in-app scanner instructions rewritten to reflect that Detect invalid data now runs independently with its own folder
